description.value:
Requirements You have a swim Speed, are underwater, and have a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained].

You sink or rise rapidly alongside your target, altering their internal pressure. You Swim up to your swim Speed either up or down, and the required creature moves with you and must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class] save. For this movement, swimming up or down isn't difficult terrain.

Success The target is unaffected

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2}.
